properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come ye sinners lost and weary Jesus' blood can make you free For He saved the worst among you When He saved a wretch like me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: (And I know, Yes I know, Jesus' blood can make the vilest sinner clean.) X2

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To the faint He giveth power Through the mountain makes a way Findeth water in the desert Turns the night to golden day

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In temptation He is near thee Holds the powers of hell at bay Guides you to the path of safety Gives you grace for every day
